text: Literally, ‘lead his people any more into Egypt, being elated with the number of his horsemen’ (in the Hebrew text, ‘so as to multiply his horsemen’). What is here discouraged is not, probably, an attempt to invade Egypt, but an attempt to secure an alliance with Egypt which would enable Israel to put cavalry into the field. Cf. III Kg. 4.26, 10.28; Is. 31.1).
